src: 🦌 Flutter 练习项目(包括集成测试、可访问性测试)。内含完整UI设计图，更贴近真实项目的练习。Flutter practice project (including integration testing and accessibility testing). Contains complete UI design drawings for a more realistic practice project.
ja: 🦌 Flutter練習プロジェクト（統合テスト・アクセシビリティテストを含む）。完全なUIデザイン図を収録し、より実際のプロジェクトに近い練習ができます。Flutter practice project (including integration testing and accessibility testing). Contains complete UI design drawings for a more realistic practice project.
